inlineCompletions.description: Flexbox layout with justify-content and align-items. Most common pattern for centering elements.
Responsive CSS Grid layout with auto-fill and minmax for fluid column sizing.
Desktop-first media query breakpoint. Applies styles at or below the specified width.
Mobile-first media query breakpoint. Applies styles at or above the specified width.
Prefers-color-scheme dark mode media query with CSS custom property overrides.
Animation shorthand with name, duration, timing function, and fill mode.
Transition shorthand with property, duration, and timing function.
Linear gradient background with direction and color stops.
Absolute centering pattern using position absolute with transform.
Sticky positioning with top offset. Element sticks to position during scroll.
Keyframes animation definition with from/to states for fade and slide effect.
Font-face declaration with woff2/woff sources and font-display swap for performance.
Grid template areas with a common header/sidebar/main/footer layout.
Border radius with common presets: subtle rounding, moderate rounding, circle, and pill shape.
Box shadow with x-offset, y-offset, blur radius, and semi-transparent color.
Text truncation pattern with ellipsis, preventing text wrap and hiding overflow.
Cascade layer ordering declaration. Layers listed first have lowest priority.
Container query for component-level responsive design based on container size.
Scroll snap type for axis and strictness. Creates carousel-like scroll behavior.
Aspect ratio with common presets: widescreen, standard, square, photo, ultrawide.
